description: Index of all scenario test files (informational — the loader globs *.json, so a missing entry here doesn't skip a file)

files.description: Test scenarios for zero fee cards
Test scenarios for card count optimization
Jamie's real cards and spending — the hand-verification scenario
Strategy presets (S1): same spender through each preset
Issuer eligibility rules (S3): application blocks, bonus ineligibility, bonus capacity
Stackability (A5): non-stackable credits count once per portfolio, stackable credits count per card, no-preference zeroes a credit
Phase E: selection-aware bonus capacity and sequencing (_bonus_capacity_plan) — avoiding wasted selection, bonus-less cards winning on ongoing value, and multi-card sequencing order
Phase J: same-program points pooling — a held premium card lifts an earner's points value, different programs don't cross-pool, a card without points_program never pools

Phase K: multi-player households — per-entity 5/24, business attribution, second-copy applies, once-per-lifetime application rule, and the Amex 5-card cap, each proving the effect is per-entity via apply_as
